504 void setCameraAttentionStatus(int i, u32 flag) { mCameraInfo[i].mCameraAttentionStatus = flag; }
505 void onCameraAttentionStatus(int i, u32 flag) { mCameraInfo[i].mCameraAttentionStatus |= flag; }
506 void offCameraAttentionStatus(int i, u32 flag) {
507 mCameraInfo[i].mCameraAttentionStatus &= ~flag;
508 }
509 void setCameraInfo(int camIdx, camera_class* p_cam, int param_2, int param_3, int param_4) {
510 mCameraInfo[camIdx].mCamera = p_cam;
511 mCameraInfo[camIdx].field_0x4 = param_2;
512 mCameraInfo[camIdx].field_0x5 = param_3;
513 mCameraInfo[camIdx].field_0x6 = param_4;
514 setCameraAttentionStatus(camIdx, 0);
515 }
516
517 f32 getCameraZoomForcus(int i_no) { return mCameraInfo[i_no].mCameraZoomForcus; }
518 void setCameraZoomScale(int i_no, f32 i_scale) { mCameraInfo[i_no].mCameraZoomScale = i_scale; }
519
520 void saveCameraPosition(int i, cXyz* i_pos, cXyz* i_target, f32 i_fovy, s16 i_bank) {
521 mCameraInfo[i].mCameraPos = *i_pos;
522 mCameraInfo[i].mCameraTarget = *i_target;
523 mCameraInfo[i].mCameraFovy = i_fovy;
524 mCameraInfo[i].mCameraBank = i_bank;
525 }
526
527 void loadCameraPosition(int i, cXyz* o_pos, cXyz* o_target, f32* o_fovy, s16* o_bank) {
528 *o_pos = mCameraInfo[i].mCameraPos;
529 *o_target = mCameraInfo[i].mCameraTarget;
530 *o_fovy = mCameraInfo[i].mCameraFovy;
531 *o_bank = mCameraInfo[i].mCameraBank;
532 }
533
534 void setMesgCamInfoID(int param_0) { mMesgCamInfo = param_0; }
535
536 void setStatus(u16 status) { mStatus = status; }
537 s32 checkStatus(u16 flags) { return flags & mStatus; }
538
539 void setDirection(u8 i_dir) { mDirection = i_dir; }
540
541 bool& isPauseFlag() { return mPauseFlag; }
542 void offPauseFlag() { mPauseFlag = false; }
543 void onPauseFlag() { mPauseFlag = true; }
544 u8 getOxygenShowFlag() { return mOxygenShowFlag; }
545 void setOxygenShowFlag(u8 flag) { mOxygenShowFlag = flag; }
546 void show2dOn() { mShow2D = 1; }
547 void show2dOff() { mShow2D = 0; }
548 u8 show2dCheck() { return mShow2D; }
549 s8 getLayerOld() { return mLayerOld; }
550 void setMesgCancelButton(u8 button) { mMesgCancelButton = button; }
551 void setMesgBgm(u8 param_0) { mMesgBgm = param_0; }
552 int getMessageCountNumber() { return mMessageCountNum; }
553 void setMessageCountNumber(u32 number) { mMessageCountNum = number; }
554
555 void setWindowNum(u8 num) { mWindowNum = num; }
556 int getWindowNum() { return mWindowNum; }
557 dDlst_window_c* getWindow(int i) { return &mWindow[i]; }
558 void setWindow(int i, f32 param_1, f32 param_2, f32 param_3, f32 param_4, f32 param_5,
559 f32 param_6, int camID, int mode) {
560 mWindow[i].setViewPort(param_1, param_2, param_3, param_4, param_5, param_6);
561 mWindow[i].setScissor(param_1, param_2, param_3, param_4);
562 mWindow[i].setCameraID(camID);
563 mWindow[i].setMode(mode);
564 }
565
566 void setLastPlayStageName(char* name) {
567 strncpy(mLastPlayStageName, name, 7);
568 mLastPlayStageName[7] = 0;
569 }
570 char* getLastPlayStageName() { return mLastPlayStageName; }
571
572 void setGameoverStatus(u8 status) { mGameoverStatus = status; }
573 u8 getGameoverStatus() { return mGameoverStatus; }
574 u8 getMesgStatus() { return mMesgStatus; }
575
576 u8 getDirection() { return mDirection; }
